expectations.text: Creates a TypeScript project with package.json including @modelcontextprotocol/sdk dependency
expectations.evidence: package.json includes @modelcontextprotocol/sdk dependency

expectations.text: Implements a Server instance with tools capability
expectations.evidence: new Server with capabilities: { tools: {} }

expectations.text: Defines a lookup_property tool with an address input parameter
expectations.evidence: Tool defined with name 'lookup_property' and address string input

expectations.text: Includes handler that calls the external API endpoint
expectations.evidence: CallToolRequestSchema handler uses axios.get to call https://api.properties.example/v1/lookup

expectations.text: Includes configuration instructions for Claude Desktop or Claude Code (.mcp.json)
expectations.evidence: Configuration section shows .mcp.json / settings.json setup

expectations.text: Uses the Python MCP SDK (mcp or fastmcp)
expectations.evidence: Uses 'from mcp.server import Server' and mcp.types

expectations.text: Defines both list_invoices and create_invoice tools with proper schemas
expectations.evidence: Both tools defined in handle_list_tools with inputSchema

expectations.text: create_invoice accepts client_name, amount, and description parameters
expectations.evidence: Schema has all three required parameters

expectations.text: Uses a JSON file for data persistence (not an in-memory dict alone)
expectations.evidence: INVOICES_FILE = Path('invoices.json'), load_invoices/save_invoices functions

expectations.text: Includes setup instructions (pip install, configuration)
expectations.evidence: Setup section with pip install mcp, configuration JSON for Claude Code
